characters.name: Alexandre
characters.description: Alexandrewas a pet cat that belong to thePeabody's, who are the neighbors of theSmall Family.  Alexandre's only appearance was in "Brendon Gets Rabies" in season one wherePaulapromised the Peabody's that she'll take care of Alexandre, however he was very spoiled, prissy and uncooperative, so Paula gives this responsibility toBrendon.  Brendon tried to take care of Alexandre, but he escaped through an open door and then gets rabies and bites Brendon when he found him.  Alexandre was taken to the vet where he was put to sleep.  A funeral was held for Alexandre and Brendon made a movie entitledIn Memory of Alexandrewas made after his death.

characters.name: Andrew (Assistant Coach)
characters.description: Andrew, the assistant coachis a coach that appeared in theseason oneepisode,Director's Cut. Andrew is more friendly and encouraging thanCoach McGuirk.

characters.name: Andrew Small
characters.description: Andrew SmallisBrendon’sestranged father, alawyer. He is 11 years older than his second wife,Linda(the two marry in "The Wedding", the season two finale). He and Brendon are re-acquainted in Season Two in "Dad", and an initially awkward relationship ultimately shows them as very close and loving, despite the tension caused by Andrew's fiancee Linda, which the trio try to deal with through 'gentle talk' in "Therapy".Coach McGuirk, after being excluded from Andrew and Brendon's pizza club, lashes out at Andrew and competes with him for Brendon's affections in "Pizza Club". However, he seems to disappear from Brendon's life and was not present for the birth of his child by his second wife Linda in the third season finale "Coffins and Cradles", because he was on a business trip resulting in Linda staying withPauladuring the final days of her pregnancy. Despite being featured in four episodes in the second season, he appears only once in the third season ("My Cheatin' Heart") and is not in any season four episodes.

characters.name: Arnold Lindenson
characters.description: Arnold LindensonisPaula'sexpressive and oddly energetic boss. He laughingly denied Paula when she asked for a raise, and assumed she would try to kill him when he fired her. Apathetic and carefree, but is oblivious about how rude he is being to others. He initially mistook Brendon for being Paula's daughter rather than her son for reasons unknown. He has a generous side, however, and offered Paula her job back on the day of her ex-husband's wedding (which she accepted). He has an unseen assistant named Juliet. Also when he realized he had been rude to Paula he formally apologized and gave her a dish of pasta.

characters.name: Babysitter
characters.description: TheBabysitteris an unnamed one-time character onHome Movies. Her only appearance in the series is in the season one episode,I Don't Do Well In Parent-Teacher Conferenceswhere she has to babysitBrendonwhilePaulagoes to a parent-teacher conference.

characters.name: Brendon Small (character)
characters.description: Brendon Smallis the main protagonist ofHome Movies. He is the writer, director and lead actor in most of his films. Brendon is a talking, breathing, thinking young boy who acts out his anxieties and problems through his films. He has had his trusty camcorder since just after babyhood, and has been making films incessantly ever since, perhaps because he began around the time his parents got divorced. Though well-meaning, logical, and surprisingly funny, he is consistently determined by apathy, oversight, and occasional egotism; he is really surprised, confused or hurt when his work is criticized.

characters.name: Clarice
characters.description: Clariceis a secondary character inHome Movies. In the season two episodeClass Trip, she worked inGalaxy CoffeethatCoach McGuirkalso worked in and she also trains McGuirk. In the season three episodeGuitarmageddon, she was also dating Dwayne's enemy,Jimmy, who calls her Little Mama and uses her for her money. Clarice reveals she knows a lot about guitar, and then goes out with Dwayne after the competition.

characters.name: Coach John McGuirk
characters.description: Coach John McGuirk(voiced byH. Jon Benjamin) isBrendonandMelissa's incompetent, greasy, acerbic soccer coach and a overweight, alcoholic Irish-American artist who constantly givesBrendonbad advice. McGuirk considers Brendon, Melissa andJasonhis friends and will usually help them out or stick up for them even though he is often rude to them (especially Melissa). He often attempts to portray a father figure for Brendon, as in the show's finale. Also, he frequently attempts to reach out toRonald Lynchand Melissa's dad,Erik, however his misguided attempts often fail due mainly to his poor attitude.

characters.name: Cynthia
characters.description: Cynthia is a bigScäbcontributor.Choreographerfor Dwayne’s band on whom Brendon has a crush. Brendon takes her on a date to Jason's country club in "Impressions," but she invites Dwayne and his band members along. He eventually confesses his feelings in a disastrously public way at abattle of the bandsin her last appearance in the second season episode "Pizza Club".

characters.name: Doris
characters.description: Dorisis the controlling mother ofPaula Small. She was in two episodes in the series. InLife Through a Fisheye Lens, Paula asks her mother for money because of the recent financial troubles Paula has been going through. InBreaking Up is Hard to Do, Doris divorces Paula's father and works on Brendon's movie, but takes her acting gig a bit seriously.

characters.name: Dr. Fizzel
characters.description: Dr. Fizzelis a one-time character inHome Movies. He appears in the season one finale,Brendon's Choicewhere he leads an anger management class whereCoach McGuirkis forced to go to deal with his problems.

characters.name: Dwayne
characters.description: Loren Bouchardconfirmed in a bonus feature in the season four DVD that Dwayne was an unplanned character. When Brendon Small and Loren Bouchard were playing various versions of the Home Movies theme song, Brendon played a heavy metal version of the theme song. They both liked it and thought they could build a character around heavy metal. Thus, Dwayne was born!

characters.name: Erik Robbins
characters.description: Erik Robbinsis the single father ofMelissa. He works as a real estate agent. He is voiced byJonathan Katz. Erik is one ofPaula's few close friends, and occasionally hints at being attracted to her. In several episodes he andMcGuirkshow signs of friendship, such as him helping McGuirk in looking for a new apartment in "Mortgages and Marbles" and reluctantly taking McGuirk with him to his journal-writing class in "Curses." He tells McGuirk that his ex-wife (Melissa's mother)  that she ran away with another man, leaving him to look after Melissa himself. When Erik attempts to begin dating again in the fourth season episode "Curses," Melissa objects and moves out. Erik is known for his wise-guy persona and constantly makes inappropriate jokes, which Melissa sees as alternately hilarious and embarrassing.  Melissa also says he buys wine coolers for the teenagers in town, claiming "they'll just buy it themselves in a few years;"Jasonlater offers the others wine coolers that Melissa's dad bought him ("Everybody's Entitled to My Opinion").

characters.name: Eugene
characters.description: Eugeneis a minor character onHome Movies. Eugene is a Russian kid who was only seen in two episodes in the series in which he is a soccer player inYokoand aSkunk Scoutsmember inThe Wizards Baker.

characters.name: Fenton Mewly
characters.description: Fenton Mewlyis a spoiled, annoying classmate with the tendency to call Brendon "Bren-Bren," and ask to be in one of his "video-films." His personality changes dramatically after McGuirk scolds Fenton for his poor treatment of his mother at his 8th birthday party, and in later episodes is seen as oddly obedient and clingy to her. Brendon once stayed at Fenton's house for the weekend in "Shore Leave"; the experience was extremely torturous and Brendon at one point feared for his own life and filmed himself hiding in the closetà laBlair Witch. Then Brendon went to the bathroom and accidentally filmed Fenton's mother getting out of the shower,also shaving, which prompted Fenton to attack Brendon. McGuirk later gets his hand on the copy of the videotape and calls to register a domain name, fentonsnakedmom.com,and middleagednakedmoms.com only to find it is taken. Fenton deeply disdains Brendon's movies, and enjoys berating him withfilm theorycriticisms, although this has more to do with his jealousy of not being in them than the actual films themselves. In the episode 'Heart Smashers', Brendon 'breaks-up' with Fenton, with Fenton taking great offense and breaking-up with Brendon as well (only Jason realizing the parallels to Fenton and Brendon's spat to a couple breaking up.) Later in the episode, however, he 'gets back together' with Fenton, in the same couple-like manner, because he almost missed having the constant annoyance. Fenton's full name.

characters.name: Honkey Magoo (dog)
characters.description: Honkey Magoois a dog that appears in the season four episode with thesame name as the dog. Honkey Magoo was found byBrendonalong withJasonandMelissawhen Coach McGuirk almost runs him over while driving. At first, the kids argue over who gets to keep him and what his name will be. Melissa calls him "Mr. Pickles", Jason calls him "Smatchimo the Trumpeteer", and Brendon names him Honkey Magoo, who he's referred to as for the rest of the episode. Honkey Magoo, like most puppies, is very energetic and can be very destructive. He frequently poops indoors, knocks over people and furniture constantly with his charging, scares away Mr. Lynch's 5 cats, attacks people, and even eats Brendon's films. The vet said that some of his bad behaviour is due to anxiety. At the end of the episode, Honkey Magoo's real owners take him home.

characters.name: Jason Penopolis
characters.description: Jason Penopolis(Voiced byH. Jon Benjamin) Jason isBrendon’s co-star who is noticeably more emotionally stunted, but can be much more aware of his surroundings and situations than others. Jason is a stout, fair-skinned 7-year-old. He has short brown hair and wears an orange overall.

characters.name: Jason's Parents
characters.description: A drawing made by Jason depicting his mom. Jason's Parentsare unnamed characters inHome Movies, who are the parents ofJason Penopolis. They are never truly seen throughout the series, but have been mentioned.

characters.name: Jimmy Monet
characters.description: Jimmy Monetis a seventeen year old teenager who isDwaynesworst enemy. Jimmy appears in two episodes ofHome Movies. His first appearance was inGuitarmageddonwhere he plays for the guitar competition and wins. He also appeared inThe Wizards Bakerin a non-speaking role. He has a girlfriend namedClarice.

characters.name: Josie Small
characters.description: Josie Smallis the adoptive daughter ofPaula Small. Josie does not have a big role in the series, but she is usually in the background. She is voiced byLoren Bouchard.

characters.name: Junior Addleburg
characters.description: Ken "Junior" Addleburgis a character fromHome Movies. He has had occasional appearances throughout the series. He appeared inseason fourthe most. He is basically a weird kid with a foreign accent. He is inSkunk Scoutsand the son ofKen Addleburg. He and his father are the only members of theAddlebergsseen in the show.

characters.name: Ken Addleburg
characters.description: Ken Addleburgis a man of indeterminate national origin who speaks in an unusual accent. He holds several jobs throughout the series, including hotel manager in "Class Trip," butcher in "Identifying a Body" and delivery man in "Politics". Ken has a son namedJunior Addleburgwho shares Ken's comical accent.

characters.name: Lifeguard / Driving Instructor
characters.description: TheLifeguard/Driving Instructoris an unnamed character onHome Movies. Just likeKen Addleburg, he has more than one job. InBroken Dreams, he appears as a lifeguard instructor where he teachesCoach McGuirkto be a lifeguard. InThose Bitches Tried to Cheat Me, he appears as a driving instructor where Coach McGuirk tries to cheat in traffic school.

characters.name: Linda
characters.description: LindaisBrendon'sstep-mother. AfterPaulaandAndrewgot divorced; Andrew began dating Linda, and they would later get married and have a baby together. She and Brendon don't get along very well. Linda threatens to throw rocks at a sleeping tiger to get it to come out of it's nest, ruining the zoo trip that Brendon and his father went on together. She later causes a fight over Brendon using her blue towel, which would later be parodied in one of Brendon's films and the incident would again be poked fun of when she goes for dinner at the Small family's house, when Brendon asks her if she was using his dinosaur glass.

characters.name: Loni
characters.description: Loniis a character inHome Movies. Loni originally appeared inI Don't Do Well In Parent-Teacher Conferences, but she was the main focus inYokowhen a camping trip romance between her andBrendonbegan. However, her old boyfriendMitchmay have not moved on and she eventually got back together with Mitch and the relationship between Brendon and Loni was short lived.
